DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF CURTIS STAHLE IN CALIFORNIA IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS BEING HEARD LESS THAN 15 DAYS PRIOR TO TRIAL. THE DISCOVERY CUT-OFF HAS PASSED. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT DILIGENT IN SEEKING THE REQUESTED RELIEF. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT
